generated_oml:
instance BuildingTelemetrySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Telemetry streams collected from HVAC, lighting, and occupancy controls via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingTelemetryDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingTelemetryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingTelemetrySensor
]

instance HVACTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic telemetry stream of HVAC system temperature, airflow, and occupancy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, EclipseHonoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingTelemetryDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingControlLogData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control logs of lighting dimmer settings captured by Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingTelemetryDataTransmitted
]

instance DittoConfigurationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Configuration files (JSON) for Eclipse Ditto twin definitions and transport"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingTelemetryDataTransmitted
]

instance UnrealAssetData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High fidelity 3D visual assets for Unreal Engine 5 visualization of building models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5VisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingTelemetryDataTransmitted
]

instance IFCBIMGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "IFC-based BIM geometry enriched with control metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance BuildingSystemsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model artefact of building systems (lighting, HVAC, control) used in simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5VisualizationEnabler
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono serves as the IoT messaging backbone for bi-directional communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables HonoDataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto provides digital twin abstraction, event handling, and twin definitions for building assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoTwinService, DittoEventService
]

instance UnrealEngine5VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 supplies high-fidelity 3D visualization interface for immersive building views"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools (Revit or ArchiCAD) author and enrich BIM data with device and control semantics"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichmentService
]

instance DittoAPIEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto API endpoint for custom analytics services"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomAnalyticsAPIService
]

instance HonoDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that ingests data into the Eclipse Hono backend"
]

instance DittoTwinService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that manages Eclipse Ditto twin definitions"
]

instance DittoEventService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that handles events from Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance UnrealVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides Unreal Engine 5 visualization"
]

instance BIMEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that enriches BIM models with device and control semantics"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring dashboards displaying telemetry streams of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingTelemetryInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionPredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption forecasting of HVAC and lighting"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight
]

instance LightingScheduleOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization engine using reinforcement learning to adjust lighting schedules"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingScheduleOptimizationAction
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance (thermal and lighting) using enriched BIM and telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingThermalSimulationInsight, BuildingLightingSimulationInsight
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization in Unreal Engine 5 for building assets and state"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance CustomAnalyticsAPIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "API exposed for custom analytics services to consume DT data via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsInsight
]

instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting dimmers embedded in the building's lighting infrastructure, exposed as discrete BCS control points that the DT can command"
]

instance LightingScheduleOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust lighting dimmer schedule via reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingTelemetryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live telemetry feed insight for building systems"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted energy consumption insight for predictive maintenance planning"
]

instance BuildingThermalSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation insight of building internal climate under current settings"
]

instance BuildingLightingSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lighting simulation insight of internal illumination under current schedules"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization insight of building status in Unreal Engine"
]

instance CustomAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight produced by custom analytics service using DT data"
]

instance EnergySavingScheduleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy-saving schedules generated from optimization engine"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT—such as lighting dimming directives or HVAC set‑point adjustments—are published through Ditto to the Hono broker and routed to the building’s control layer, enabling the BCS to enact the desired state changes."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, near real‑time synchronization; updates are propagated to the DT as soon as sensor data arrives and control commands are acknowledged."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular architecture where the building‑level twin orchestrates sensor and actuator twins via Ditto, Hono broker, and a real‑time control engine. Service plug‑ins (e.g., RL optimizer, anomaly detector) subscribe to twin events and publish new state. The constellation provides end‑to‑end data flow from PT to DT and back."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT lifecycle covers (1) Design – BIM representation of intended (ideal) building; (2) Construction – real‑time data collection during construction; (3) Commissioning – validation of control logic; (4) Operation – ongoing runtime data streaming and optimization; (5) Renovation – updating the BIM and DT with as‑built modifications. Each stage leverages the same model‑to‑text transformation pipeline."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Semantic drift is mitigated by periodic re‑validation of BIM against physical sensor data; the ODTE metric quantifies the entanglement between DT and PT; validation of control logic is performed through simulation in Unreal Engine before live deployment; uncertainty is modeled via stochastic input ranges for sensors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication uses the Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols; the DT communicates with physical devices via device twins and brokers, without specifying low‑level transport protocols in the text."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The twin framework exposes standardized APIs that enable integration with external systems (e.g., HVAC BMS, energy management platforms). The use of open protocols and data models (e.g., MQTT, JSON, IFC) facilitates horizontal interoperability across heterogeneous infrastructure components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture adheres to AECO standards: BIM/IFC for geometric and semantic data, Eclipse Ditto and Hono for IoT integration (standardized MQTT/HTTPS APIs), and Unreal Engine for visualization. Extension points are defined to conform to future open standards."
]
